name: Rcp: Potato Wedges
recipeIngredient: 8 large potatoes, unpeeled, cut into 8 wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Arrange potato wedges, peel side down, in 2 shallow baking pans.
3. Mix remaining ingredients and brush over potatoes.
4. Bake in preheated oven for 45 minutes, or until potatoes are golden brown and tender, brushing occasionally with oil mixture.
